name: Tark Shaastra — 24 Hours Hackathon
description: A flagship hackathon where teams collaborate to build impactful prototypes within 24 hours, tackling real-world challenges through creativity, coding, and problem-solving.

name: Tark Shaastra — 24 Hours Hackathon
description: A flagship hackathon where teams collaborate to build impactful prototypes within 24 hours, tackling real-world challenges through creativity, coding, and problem-solving.

name: Rapid CAD Arena
description: A high-intensity CAD design challenge where participants convert engineering requirements into precise 2D drawings and 3D models under strict time limits.

name: Rapid CAD Arena
description: A high-intensity CAD design challenge where participants convert engineering requirements into precise 2D drawings and 3D models under strict time limits.

name: Drone Grand Prix
description: A competitive drone racing event where teams navigate a specially designed obstacle course, evaluated on speed, stability, control, and durability.

name: Aero-Struct Challenges
description: A two-round engineering showdown — teams build a load-bearing chassis from simple materials, then craft an aerodynamic body tested under live airflow.

name: Structural Survival
description: Teams design and construct a bridge model from simple materials, which is tested with increasing loads until failure, evaluating structural ingenuity and efficiency.

name: Structural Survival
description: Teams design and construct a bridge model from simple materials, which is tested with increasing loads until failure, evaluating structural ingenuity and efficiency.

name: RoboRush
description: Teams engineer FPV-enabled robots and guide them through an intense obstacle course — ramps, tunnels, sharp turns — entirely via a live first-person camera feed.

name: Renewable ReMakers
description: A sustainability challenge where teams design working prototypes that transform waste materials into renewable energy solutions like biogas, biofuel, or bioelectricity.

name: Auction & Creation
description: An electronics innovation challenge where teams build a functional prototype from given components, with a live auction adding a strategic layer to the competition.

name: C2C Display Presentation
description: A structured presentation event where participants showcase their projects, innovations, or research through compelling visual displays to an audience and judging panel.

name: Civil Chaos
description: Teams first create a meme highlighting a real civil engineering problem, then develop a technical poster proposing an innovative solution, followed by a judge Q&A.

name: Civil Chaos
description: Teams first create a meme highlighting a real civil engineering problem, then develop a technical poster proposing an innovative solution, followed by a judge Q&A.

name: Quiz Crete
description: A multi-round civil engineering quiz testing concepts through MCQs, visual-based questions, and case-based problems under competitive pressure.

name: Youth Parliament
description: A simulation of parliamentary proceedings fostering leadership, public speaking, and policy understanding through structured debates on national development themes.

name: Youth Parliament
description: A simulation of parliamentary proceedings fostering leadership, public speaking, and policy understanding through structured debates on national development themes.

name: Circuit Debugging
description: A two-round electronics challenge — teams first simulate and debug circuits digitally, then physically build and verify the same circuit on a breadboard.

name: Pitch the Idea
description: An entrepreneurship event where participants pitch innovative startup ideas to a panel of judges, evaluated on originality, business model clarity, and delivery.

name: Pitch the Idea
description: An entrepreneurship event where participants pitch innovative startup ideas to a panel of judges, evaluated on originality, business model clarity, and delivery.

name: Balance Track
description: Teams design a self-balancing autonomous robot that follows a predefined track while carrying a mounted water can, maintaining stability without external support.

name: Short Film Generation
description: Participants use AI tools to generate short films centred around the theme of sustainability and environmental impact, judged on storytelling and innovative use of AI.

name: RoboMaze (Maze Solver)
description: Participants build autonomous robots capable of navigating a predefined maze using only onboard sensors and programming — no human intervention allowed.

name: Filter Fusion
description: A sustainability challenge where teams build filtration systems from waste or recyclable materials for water purification or air filtration, promoting circular economy practices.

name: LineXplorer
description: A robotics competition where participants design autonomous line-following robots, encouraging hands-on learning in embedded systems, sensor programming, and autonomous control.

name: The Painted Realm (Cosmic Palette)
description: A live space-themed art competition where participants bring their cosmic imagination to life through painting and illustration based on a surprise on-the-spot theme.

name: ChemVista
description: A creative poster design competition encouraging students to visually communicate ideas around sustainability, green technology, and engineering innovation.

name: TechTrace
description: A campus-wide treasure hunt where teams solve coding clues and technical puzzles across multiple locations, covering programming, binary logic, and algorithms.

name: Chem-CarBurn
description: Teams design and build a model car powered by chemical reactions and compete on a track, judged on speed, stability, and accuracy of performance.

name: SimulChem
description: Participants design and simulate a chemical process using tools like DWSIM, building flowsheets and optimising performance within competition constraints.

name: ChemQuest
description: A technical quiz competition focused on core chemical engineering concepts — thermodynamics, heat transfer, fluid mechanics, reaction engineering, and industrial processes.

name: PromptCraft
description: An AI competition where participants craft precise and creative prompts to generate optimal outputs from AI tools, reflecting the real-world importance of prompt engineering.

name: Imposter Code Quest
description: A unique challenge blending programming ability with social deduction — teams solve a programming problem while secretly identifying an impostor among them.

name: Eco-Clean Water Fest
description: Participants design an adsorption column using agro-bio waste materials to remove colour from industrial wastewater, evaluated on clarity and colour removal efficiency.

name: Market Masters — Stock Market Seminar
description: An insightful seminar by experienced traders and finance professionals covering how global financial markets operate, including trading strategies, instruments, and risk management.

name: ByteHunt
description: A tech-based competitive hunt where participants tackle byte-sized challenges spanning coding, logic, and digital problem-solving, racing through clues across computing concepts.

name: The Changemaker
description: A raw, unscripted live podcast session featuring a real changemaker discussing grassroots impact, personal failures, career clarity, and youth participation in nation-building.

name: SpaceTalks
description: SpaceTalks Live is an interactive podcast-style session featuring distinguished industry professionals and technical experts in conversation with student moderators.

name: SpaceTalks
description: SpaceTalks Live is an interactive podcast-style session featuring distinguished industry professionals and technical experts in conversation with student moderators.

name: Engineer of the Year
description: Engineer of the Year is the flagship multi-stage competition designed to identify the most versatile and capable engineering mind.

name: VR Game Zone
description: Experience the future of gaming with our immersive VR game zone!

name: VR Game Zone
description: Experience the future of gaming with our immersive VR game zone!

name: Digital Twin Workshop
description: A two-day hands-on workshop introducing students to the cutting-edge world of Digital Twin technology.

name: Digital Twin Workshop
description: A two-day hands-on workshop introducing students to the cutting-edge world of Digital Twin technology.

name: Opening Ceremony
description: The official opening ceremony of Lakshya Techfest 2026.

name: Sky Gazing Night
description: A night sky observation session for astronomy enthusiasts — gaze at stars, planets, and celestial events with guided telescopes.

name: Felicitation Ceremony
description: The closing and prize distribution ceremony of Lakshya Techfest 2026.
